summary: NIRGRANTHA branded educational management portal with multiple user portals (student, teacher, parent, institute). All instances of 'EduManage' branding must be replaced with 'NIRGRANTHA' throughout the app, including post-login footers and all pages.
architectural_notes: Branding must use 'NIRGRANTHA' exclusively — 'EduManage' must not appear anywhere in the app including headers, footers, login pages, and post-login pages
known_issues: Post-login footer still shows 'EduManage' instead of 'NIRGRANTHA'

existing_features.title: Find and replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' (including variations like 'EduManage.', 'EDUMANAGE') with 'Nirgrantha' in all post-login frontend components, including but not limited to: the footer component (which currently shows '© 2026 EduManage. All rights reserved.'), the SmartCampus Connect logo area, dashboard shells (StudentDashboard.tsx, FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, ParentInsightPortal.tsx), and any sub-components under frontend/src/components/tabs/. No instance of 'EduManage' should appear anywhere in the rendered UI after login.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace all 'EduManage' branding with 'NIRGRANTHA' everywhere in the app, including post-login page footers and any other remaining instances
